+
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://www.ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+  <xacro:macro name="orbbec_astra"
+               params="parent_link
+                       xyz:='0.0 0.0 0.0'
+                       rpy:='0.0 0.0 0.0'
+                       namespace:=''
+                       device_namespace:=camera">
+
+    <xacro:property name="ns" value="${namespace + '/' if namespace != '' else ''}" />
+
+    <joint name="${parent_link.rstrip('_link')}_to_${device_namespace}_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="${xyz}" rpy="${rpy}" />
+      <parent link="${parent_link}" />
+      <child link="${device_namespace}_link" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${device_namespace}_link" />
+
+    <joint name="${parent_link.rstrip('_link')}_to_${device_namespace}_orbbec_astra_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="${xyz}" rpy="${rpy}" />
+      <parent link="${parent_link}" />
+      <child link="${device_namespace}_orbbec_astra_link" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${device_namespace}_orbbec_astra_link">
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 0.0" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://husarion_components_description/meshes/orbbec_astra.dae" />
+        </geometry>
+      </visual>
+
+      <!-- camera module collision -->
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="${0.0225-0.04/2.0} 0.0 ${0.019+0.03/2.0}" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <box size="0.04 0.165 0.03" />
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+
+      <!-- mounting base model collision -->
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="${0.0235-0.06/2.0} 0.0 ${0.019/2.0}" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <box size="0.06 0.06 0.019" />
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 ${0.019+0.01}" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+        <mass value="0.300" />
+        <inertia ixx="0.00073916" ixy="0.0"        ixz="0.0"
+                                  iyy="0.00015435" iyz="0.0"
+                                                   izz="0.00077395" />
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${parent_link.rstrip('_link')}_to_${device_namespace}_color_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="-0.002 0.0125 0.03325" rpy="-0.003 0.0 -0.003" />
+      <parent link="${device_namespace}_link" />
+      <child link="${device_namespace}_color_frame" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${device_namespace}_depth_frame" />
+
+    <joint name="${parent_link.rstrip('_link')}_to_${device_namespace}_depth_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 0.03325" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+      <parent link="${device_namespace}_link" />
+      <child link="${device_namespace}_depth_frame" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${device_namespace}_color_frame" />
+
+    <joint name="${device_namespace}_color_to_${device_namespace}_color_optical_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 0.0" rpy="${-pi/2} 0.0 ${-pi/2}" />
+      <parent link="${device_namespace}_color_frame" />
+      <child link="${device_namespace}_color_optical_frame" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${device_namespace}_depth_optical_frame" />
+
+    <joint name="${device_namespace}_depth_to_${device_namespace}_depth_optical_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 0.0" rpy="${-pi/2} 0.0 ${-pi/2}" />
+      <parent link="${device_namespace}_depth_frame" />
+      <child link="${device_namespace}_depth_optical_frame" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${device_namespace}_color_optical_frame" />
+
+    <!-- GAZEBO -->
+    <!-- https://github.com/orbbec/OrbbecSDK_ROS2#all-available-topics -->
+    <xacro:include filename="$(find husarion_components_description)/urdf/gz_sensor.urdf.xacro" ns="gz_sensor" />
+
+    <xacro:gz_sensor.camera
+      reference="${device_namespace}_link"
+      name="${ns}${device_namespace}_orbbec_astra_color"
+      topic="${ns}${device_namespace}/color/image_raw"
+      frame_id="${ns}${device_namespace}_color_optical_frame"
+      frequency="30"
+      width="640"
+      height="480"
+      fov="${60.0/180.0*pi}" />
+
+    <xacro:gz_sensor.depth_camera
+      reference="${device_namespace}_link"
+      name="${ns}${device_namespace}_orbbec_astra_depth"
+      topic="${ns}${device_namespace}/depth/image_raw"
+      frame_id="${ns}${device_namespace}_depth_optical_frame"
+      frequency="30"
+      width="640"
+      height="480"
+      fov="${60.0/180.0*pi}"
+      min_dist="0.6"
+      max_dist="8.0"
+      stddev_error="0.05" />
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+</robot>

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+
+<!--

+WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
+See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
+limitations under the License.
+-->
+
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://www.ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+    <xacro:macro name="ouster"
+               params="parent_link
+                       xyz:='0.0 0.0 0.0'
+                       rpy:='0.0 0.0 0.0'
+                       model:=os1_32
+                       namespace:=''
+                       device_namespace:=''">
+
+    <xacro:if value="${model == 'os0_32'}">
+      <xacro:property name="vfov" value="${radians(90.0)}" scope="parent" />
+      <xacro:property name="lidar_range" value="50" scope="parent"/>
+      <xacro:property name="layers" value="32" scope="parent"/>
+      <xacro:property name="mesh" value="ouster_os01" scope="parent"/>
+    </xacro:if>
+
+    <xacro:if value="${model == 'os0_64'}">
+      <xacro:property name="vfov" value="${radians(90.0)}" scope="parent" />
+      <xacro:property name="lidar_range" value="50" scope="parent" />
+      <xacro:property name="layers" value="64" scope="parent" />
+      <xacro:property name="mesh" value="ouster_os01" scope="parent"/>
+    </xacro:if>
+
+    <xacro:if value="${model == 'os0_128'}">
+      <xacro:property name="vfov" value="${radians(90.0)}" scope="parent" />
+      <xacro:property name="lidar_range" value="50" scope="parent" />
+      <xacro:property name="layers" value="128" scope="parent" />
+      <xacro:property name="mesh" value="ouster_os01" scope="parent"/>
+    </xacro:if>
+
+    <xacro:if value="${model == 'os1_32'}">
+      <xacro:property name="vfov" value="${radians(45.0)}" scope="parent" />
+      <xacro:property name="lidar_range" value="120" scope="parent" />
+      <xacro:property name="layers" value="32" scope="parent" />
+      <xacro:property name="mesh" value="ouster_os01" scope="parent"/>
+    </xacro:if>
+
+    <xacro:if value="${model == 'os1_64'}">
+      <xacro:property name="vfov" value="${radians(45.0)}" scope="parent" />
+      <xacro:property name="lidar_range" value="120" scope="parent" />
+      <xacro:property name="layers" value="64" scope="parent" />
+      <xacro:property name="mesh" value="ouster_os01" scope="parent"/>
+    </xacro:if>
+
+    <xacro:if value="${model == 'os1_128'}">
+      <xacro:property name="vfov" value="${radians(45.0)}" scope="parent" />
+      <xacro:property name="lidar_range" value="120" scope="parent" />
+      <xacro:property name="layers" value="128" scope="parent" />
+      <xacro:property name="mesh" value="ouster_os01" scope="parent"/>
+    </xacro:if>
+
+    <xacro:property name="ns" value="${namespace + '/' if namespace != '' else ''}" />
+    <xacro:property name="prefix" value="${device_namespace + '_' if device_namespace != '' else ''}" />
+    <xacro:property name="device_ns" value="${device_namespace + '/' if device_namespace != '' else ''}" />
+
+    <joint name="${parent_link.rstrip('_link')}_to_${prefix}ouster_${model}_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="${xyz}" rpy="${rpy}" />
+      <parent link="${parent_link}" />
+      <child link="${prefix}ouster_${model}_link" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${prefix}ouster_${model}_link">
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 0.0" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://husarion_components_description/meshes/${mesh}.dae" />
+        </geometry>
+      </visual>
+
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 ${0.072/2.0}" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <cylinder radius="${0.085/2.0}" length="0.073" />
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 ${0.072/2.0}" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+        <mass value="0.447" />
+        <inertia ixx="0.00047706" ixy="0.0"        ixz="0.0"
+                                  iyy="0.00047706" iyz="0.0"
+                                                   izz="0.00053722" />
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${prefix}ouster_${model}_to_${prefix}os_lidar_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 0.03618" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+      <parent link="${prefix}ouster_${model}_link" />
+      <child link="${prefix}os_lidar" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${prefix}os_lidar" />
+
+    <gazebo reference="${prefix}os_lidar">
+      <!-- gpu_lidar has to be set, CPU lidar doesn't work in ignition -
+      https://github.com/gazebosim/gz-sensors/issues/26 -->
+      <sensor type="gpu_lidar" name="${ns}${prefix}ouster_${model}_sensor">
+        <visualize>false</visualize>
+        <ray>
+          <scan>
+            <horizontal>
+              <samples>1024</samples>
+              <resolution>1</resolution>
+              <min_angle>-${pi}</min_angle>
+              <max_angle>${pi}</max_angle>
+            </horizontal>
+            <vertical>
+              <samples>${layers}</samples>
+              <resolution>1</resolution>
+              <min_angle>${vfov/-2.0}</min_angle>
+              <max_angle>${vfov/2.0}</max_angle>
+            </vertical>
+          </scan>
+          <range>
+            <min>0.8</min>
+            <max>${lidar_range}</max>
+            <resolution>0.003</resolution>
+          </range>
+
+          <noise>
+            <type>gaussian</type>
+            <mean>0.0</mean>
+            <stddev>0.0008</stddev>
+          </noise>
+        </ray>
+
+        <update_rate>20.0</update_rate>
+
+        <topic>${ns}${device_ns}ouster/points</topic>
+        <gz_frame_id>${ns}${prefix}os_lidar</gz_frame_id>
+        <always_on>true</always_on>
+      </sensor>
+    </gazebo>
+  </xacro:macro>
+</robot>

+

+
+<robot name="robotiq" xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+  <xacro:macro name="robotiq"
+               params="parent_link
+                       xyz:='0.0 0.0 0.0'
+                       rpy:='0.0 0.0 0.0'
+                       robotiq_type:=2f_85
+                       device_namespace:=''">
+
+    <xacro:include
+      filename="$(find robotiq_description)/urdf/robotiq_${robotiq_type}_macro.urdf.xacro"
+      ns="gripper" />
+
+    <xacro:property name="prefix" value="${device_namespace + '_' if device_namespace != '' else ''}" />
+
+    <xacro:gripper.robotiq_gripper name="${device_namespace}robotiq_${robotiq_type}"
+      prefix="${prefix}"
+      parent="${parent_link}"
+      use_fake_hardware="false"
+      sim_ignition="true"
+    >
+      <origin xyz="${xyz}" rpy="${rpy}" />
+    </xacro:gripper.robotiq_gripper>
+  </xacro:macro>
+</robot>

+
+    <gazebo reference="${prefix}laser">
+      <sensor type="gpu_lidar" name="${ns}${prefix}slamtec_rplidar_sensor">
+        <always_on>false</always_on>
+        <update_rate>10</update_rate>
+        <visualize>false</visualize>
+
+        <topic>${ns}${device_ns}scan</topic>
+        <gz_frame_id>${ns}${prefix}laser</gz_frame_id>
+
+        <ray>
+          <scan>
+            <horizontal>
+              <samples>${samples}</samples>
+              <resolution>1</resolution>
+              <min_angle>-${pi}</min_angle>
+              <max_angle>${pi}</max_angle>
+            </horizontal>
+          </scan>
+          <range>
+            <min>${dist_min}</min>
+            <max>${dist_max}</max>
+            <resolution>${dist_res}</resolution>
+          </range>
+          <noise>
+            <type>gaussian</type>
+            <mean>0.0</mean>
+            <stddev>${std_dev}</stddev>
+          </noise>
+        </ray>
+      </sensor>
+    </gazebo>
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+</robot>

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+
+<!--
+Copyright 2022 Stereolabs
+Copyright 2025 Husarion sp. z o.o.
+
+Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
+you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
+You may obtain a copy of the License at
+
+   http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
+
+Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
+distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
+WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
+See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
+limitations under the License.
+-->
+
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://wiki.ros.org/xacro">
+  <xacro:property name="M_PI" value="3.1415926535897931" />
+
+  <xacro:macro name="zed_camera"
+               params="parent_link
+                       xyz:='0.0 0.0 0.0'
+                       rpy:='0.0 0.0 0.0'
+                       model:=zed
+                       namespace:=''
+                       device_namespace:=zed">
+
+    <xacro:property name="ns" value="${namespace + '/' if namespace != '' else ''}" />
+
+    <xacro:if value="${model == 'zed'}">
+      <xacro:property name="baseline" value="0.12" />
+      <xacro:property name="height" value="0.03" />
+      <xacro:property name="bottom_slope" value="0.05" />
+      <xacro:property name="screw_offset_x" value="0.0" />
+      <xacro:property name="screw_offset_z" value="0.0" />
+      <xacro:property name="optical_offset_x" value="-0.01" />
+    </xacro:if>
+    <xacro:if value="${model == 'zedm'}">
+      <xacro:property name="baseline" value="0.06" />
+      <xacro:property name="height" value="0.0265" />
+      <xacro:property name="bottom_slope" value="0.0" />
+      <xacro:property name="screw_offset_x" value="0.0" />
+      <xacro:property name="screw_offset_z" value="0.0" />
+      <xacro:property name="optical_offset_x" value="0.0" />
+    </xacro:if>
+    <xacro:if value="${model == 'zed2'}">
+      <xacro:property name="baseline" value="0.12" />
+      <xacro:property name="height" value="0.03" />
+      <xacro:property name="bottom_slope" value="0.05" />
+      <xacro:property name="screw_offset_x" value="0.0" />
+      <xacro:property name="screw_offset_z" value="0.0" />
+      <xacro:property name="optical_offset_x" value="-0.01" />
+    </xacro:if>
+    <xacro:if value="${model == 'zed2i'}">
+      <xacro:property name="baseline" value="0.12" />
+      <xacro:property name="height" value="0.03" />
+      <xacro:property name="bottom_slope" value="0.0" />
+      <xacro:property name="screw_offset_x" value="-0.01" />
+      <xacro:property name="screw_offset_z" value="0.0" />
+      <xacro:property name="optical_offset_x" value="-0.01" />
+    </xacro:if>
+    <xacro:if value="${model == 'zedx'}">
+      <xacro:property name="baseline" value="0.12" />
+      <xacro:property name="height" value="0.032" />
+      <xacro:property name="bottom_slope" value="0.0" />
+      <xacro:property name="screw_offset_x" value="0.0" />
+      <xacro:property name="screw_offset_z" value="-0.016" />
+      <xacro:property name="optical_offset_x" value="-0.01" />
+    </xacro:if>
+    <xacro:if value="${model == 'zedxm'}">
+      <xacro:property name="baseline" value="0.05" />
+      <xacro:property name="height" value="0.032" />
+      <xacro:property name="bottom_slope" value="0.0" />
+      <xacro:property name="screw_offset_x" value="0.0" />
+      <xacro:property name="screw_offset_z" value="-0.016" />
+      <xacro:property name="optical_offset_x" value="-0.01" />
+    </xacro:if>
+
+    <!-- Camera mounting point (the threaded screw hole in the bottom) -->
+    <link name="${device_namespace}_link" />
+    <joint name="${device_namespace}_base_joint" type="fixed">
+      <parent link="${parent_link}" />
+      <child link="${device_namespace}_link" />
+      <origin xyz="${xyz}" rpy="${rpy}" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <!-- Camera Center -->
+    <link name="${device_namespace}_center">
+      <visual>
+        <!-- 0.02 in x is caused because the visual model is in the frame -->
+        <origin xyz="${screw_offset_x-0.02} 0 ${screw_offset_z}" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://husarion_components_description/meshes/stereolabs/${model}.stl" />
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="mat">
+          <color rgba="0.25 0.25 0.25 0.99" />
+        </material>
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://husarion_components_description/meshes/stereolabs/${model}.stl" />
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+    <joint name="${device_namespace}_camera_center_joint" type="fixed">
+      <parent link="${device_namespace}_link" />
+      <child link="${device_namespace}_center" />
+      <!-- 0.02 in x is caused because the visual model is in the frame -->
+      <origin xyz="0.02 0 ${height/2}" rpy="0 ${bottom_slope} 0" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <!-- Artificially Created Camera Center -->
+    <link name="${device_namespace}_center_optical_frame" />
+    <joint name="${device_namespace}_center_joint" type="fixed">
+      <parent link="${device_namespace}_center" />
+      <child link="${device_namespace}_center_optical_frame" />
+      <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 0.0" rpy="${-pi/2.0} 0 ${-pi/2.0}" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <!-- Left Camera -->
+    <link name="${device_namespace}_left_camera_frame" />
+    <joint name="${device_namespace}_left_camera_joint" type="fixed">
+      <parent link="${device_namespace}_center" />
+      <child link="${device_namespace}_left_camera_frame" />
+      <origin xyz="${optical_offset_x} ${baseline/2} 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${device_namespace}_left_camera_optical_frame" />
+    <joint name="${device_namespace}_left_camera_optical_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="-${M_PI/2} 0.0 -${M_PI/2}" />
+      <parent link="${device_namespace}_left_camera_frame" />
+      <child link="${device_namespace}_left_camera_optical_frame" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <!-- Right Camera -->
+    <link name="${device_namespace}_right_camera_frame" />
+    <joint name="${device_namespace}_right_camera_joint" type="fixed">
+      <parent link="${device_namespace}_center" />
+      <child link="${device_namespace}_right_camera_frame" />
+      <origin xyz="${optical_offset_x} -${baseline/2} 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${device_namespace}_right_camera_optical_frame" />
+    <joint name="${device_namespace}_right_camera_optical_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="-${M_PI/2} 0.0 -${M_PI/2}" />
+      <parent link="${device_namespace}_right_camera_frame" />
+      <child link="${device_namespace}_right_camera_optical_frame" />
+    </joint>
+
+
+    <!-- ZED2 Sensors -->
+    <xacro:if value="${model == 'zed2'}">
+      <link name="${device_namespace}_mag_link" />
+      <joint name="${device_namespace}_mag_joint" type="fixed">
+        <parent link="${device_namespace}_center" />
+        <child link="${device_namespace}_mag_link" />
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+      </joint>
+
+      <link name="${device_namespace}_baro_link" />
+      <joint name="${device_namespace}_baro_joint" type="fixed">
+        <parent link="${device_namespace}_center" />
+        <child link="${device_namespace}_baro_link" />
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+      </joint>
+
+      <link name="${device_namespace}_temp_left_link" />
+      <joint name="${device_namespace}_temp_left_joint" type="fixed">
+        <parent link="${device_namespace}_left_camera_frame" />
+        <child link="${device_namespace}_temp_left_link" />
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+      </joint>
+    </xacro:if>
+
+    <!-- It is also possible to use single rgbd_camera sensor, but using separate rgb and depth
+    camera
+      should be more accurate different frames and fovs can be set -->
+    <gazebo reference="${device_namespace}_center">
+      <sensor type="camera" name="${ns}${device_namespace}_stereolabs_zed_color">
+        <always_on>true</always_on>
+        <update_rate>30.0</update_rate>
+
+        <topic>${ns}${device_namespace}/zed_node/rgb/image_rect_color</topic>
+        <visualize>false</visualize>
+
+        <gz_frame_id>${ns}${device_namespace}_center_optical_frame</gz_frame_id>
+        <camera>
+          <horizontal_fov>${110.0/180.0*pi}</horizontal_fov>
+          <image>
+            <width>1920</width>
+            <height>1080</height>
+            <format>R8G8B8</format>
+          </image>
+          <clip>
+            <near>0.02</near>
+            <far>300.0</far>
+          </clip>
+        </camera>
+      </sensor>
+    </gazebo>
+
+    <gazebo reference="${device_namespace}_center">
+      <sensor type="depth_camera" name="${ns}${device_namespace}_stereolabs_zed_depth">
+        <always_on>true</always_on>
+        <update_rate>30.0</update_rate>
+
+        <topic>${ns}${device_namespace}/zed_node/depth</topic>
+        <visualize>false</visualize>
+
+        <gz_frame_id>${ns}${device_namespace}_center_optical_frame</gz_frame_id>
+        <camera>
+          <horizontal_fov>${110.0/180.0*pi}</horizontal_fov>
+          <image>
+            <width>1920</width>
+            <height>1080</height>
+
+            <format>R_FLOAT32</format>
+          </image>
+          <clip>
+            <near>0.3</near>
+            <far>20.0</far>
+          </clip>
+          <noise type="gaussian">
+            <mean>0.0</mean>
+            <stddev>0.03</stddev>
+          </noise>
+        </camera>
+
+      </sensor>
+    </gazebo>
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+</robot>

+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://wiki.ros.org/xacro">
+  <xacro:macro name="teltonika_003R-00253"
+               params="parent_link
+                       xyz:='0.0 0.0 0.0'
+                       rpy:='0.0 0.0 0.0'
+                       namespace:=''
+                       device_namespace:=gps">
+
+    <xacro:property name="ns" value="${namespace + '/' if namespace != '' else ''}" />
+
+    <joint name="${parent_link.rstrip('_link')}_to_antenna_joint"
+      type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="${xyz}" rpy="${rpy}" />
+      <parent link="${parent_link}" />
+      <child link="${device_namespace}_mounting_point" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${device_namespace}_mounting_point">
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 0.0" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://husarion_components_description/meshes/teltonika_003R-00253.dae" />
+        </geometry>
+      </visual>
+
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 0.0" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh
+            filename="package://husarion_components_description/meshes/teltonika_003R-00253_collision.stl" />
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0.045 0.0 0.0058" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+        <mass value="0.59" />
+        <inertia ixx="0.003964" ixy="0.0000000" ixz="0.0"
+                                iyy="0.0003964" iyz="0.0"
+                                                izz="0.0004177" />
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint
+      name="antenna_to_${device_namespace.rstrip('_link')}_joint"
+      type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="0.045 0.0 0.0058" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+      <parent link="${device_namespace}_mounting_point" />
+      <child link="${device_namespace}" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${device_namespace}" />
+
+    <gazebo reference="${device_namespace}">
+      <sensor name="navsat" type="navsat">
+        <plugin filename="ignition-gazebo-navsat-system" name="ignition::gazebo::systems::NavSat" />
+        <always_on>1</always_on>
+        <update_rate>1</update_rate>
+        <topic>${ns}${device_namespace}/fix</topic>
+        <gz_frame_id>${ns}${device_namespace}</gz_frame_id>
+      </sensor>
+    </gazebo>
+  </xacro:macro>
+</robot>

+<robot name="ur" xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+  <xacro:macro name="ur"
+               params="parent_link
+                       xyz:='0.0 0.0 0.0'
+                       rpy:='0.0 0.0 0.0'
+                       device_namespace:=''
+                       ur_type:=ur3e">
+
+    <xacro:include filename="$(find ur_description)/urdf/ur_macro.xacro" ns="ur_manipulator" />
+
+    <xacro:property name="prefix" value="${device_namespace + '_' if device_namespace != '' else ''}" />
+
+    <xacro:property name="joint_limit_params"
+      value="$(find ur_description)/config/${ur_type}/joint_limits.yaml" scope="parent" />
+    <xacro:property name="kinematics_params"
+      value="$(find ur_description)/config/${ur_type}/default_kinematics.yaml" scope="parent" />
+    <xacro:property name="physical_params"
+      value="$(find ur_description)/config/${ur_type}/physical_parameters.yaml" scope="parent" />
+    <xacro:property name="visual_params"
+      value="$(find ur_description)/config/${ur_type}/visual_parameters.yaml" scope="parent" />
+    <xacro:property name="simulation_controllers"
+      value="$(find husarion_components_description)/config/ur_controllers.yaml" scope="parent" />
+
+      <xacro:property name="initial_positions_file" default="$(find ur_description)/config/initial_positions.yaml" />
+      <xacro:property name="initial_positions"
+        value="${xacro.load_yaml(initial_positions_file)}" scope="parent" />
+
+    <xacro:ur_manipulator.ur_robot
+      name="${ur_type}"
+      tf_prefix="${prefix}"
+      parent="${parent_link}"
+      joint_limits_parameters_file="${joint_limit_params}"
+      kinematics_parameters_file="${kinematics_params}"
+      physical_parameters_file="${physical_params}"
+      visual_parameters_file="${visual_params}"
+    >
+      <origin xyz="${xyz}" rpy="${rpy}" />
+    </xacro:ur_manipulator.ur_robot>
+
+
+    <ros2_control name="${prefix + ur_type}" type="system">
+      <hardware>
+        <plugin>gz_ros2_control/GazeboSimSystem</plugin>
+      </hardware>
+      <joint name="${prefix}shoulder_pan_joint">
+        <command_interface name="position">
+          <param name="min">{-2*pi}</param>
+          <param name="max">{2*pi}</param>
+        </command_interface>
+        <command_interface name="velocity">
+          <param name="min">-3.15</param>
+          <param name="max">3.15</param>
+        </command_interface>
+        <state_interface name="position">
+          <!-- initial position for the FakeSystem and simulation -->
+          <param name="initial_value">${initial_positions['shoulder_pan_joint']}</param>
+        </state_interface>
+        <state_interface name="velocity" />
+        <state_interface name="effort" />
+      </joint>
+      <joint name="${prefix}shoulder_lift_joint">
+        <command_interface name="position">
+          <param name="min">{-2*pi}</param>
+          <param name="max">{2*pi}</param>
+        </command_interface>
+        <command_interface name="velocity">
+          <param name="min">-3.15</param>
+          <param name="max">3.15</param>
+        </command_interface>
+        <state_interface name="position">
+          <!-- initial position for the FakeSystem and simulation -->
+          <param name="initial_value">${initial_positions['shoulder_lift_joint']}</param>
+        </state_interface>
+        <state_interface name="velocity" />
+        <state_interface name="effort" />
+      </joint>
+      <joint name="${prefix}elbow_joint">
+        <command_interface name="position">
+          <param name="min">{-pi}</param>
+          <param name="max">{pi}</param>
+        </command_interface>
+        <command_interface name="velocity">
+          <param name="min">-3.15</param>
+          <param name="max">3.15</param>
+        </command_interface>
+        <state_interface name="position">
+          <!-- initial position for the FakeSystem and simulation -->
+          <param name="initial_value">${initial_positions['elbow_joint']}</param>
+        </state_interface>
+        <state_interface name="velocity" />
+        <state_interface name="effort" />
+      </joint>
+      <joint name="${prefix}wrist_1_joint">
+        <command_interface name="position">
+          <param name="min">{-2*pi}</param>
+          <param name="max">{2*pi}</param>
+        </command_interface>
+        <command_interface name="velocity">
+          <param name="min">-3.2</param>
+          <param name="max">3.2</param>
+        </command_interface>
+        <state_interface name="position">
+          <!-- initial position for the FakeSystem and simulation -->
+          <param name="initial_value">${initial_positions['wrist_1_joint']}</param>
+        </state_interface>
+        <state_interface name="velocity" />
+        <state_interface name="effort" />
+      </joint>
+      <joint name="${prefix}wrist_2_joint">
+        <command_interface name="position">
+          <param name="min">{-2*pi}</param>
+          <param name="max">{2*pi}</param>
+        </command_interface>
+        <command_interface name="velocity">
+          <param name="min">-3.2</param>
+          <param name="max">3.2</param>
+        </command_interface>
+        <state_interface name="position">
+          <!-- initial position for the FakeSystem and simulation -->
+          <param name="initial_value">${initial_positions['wrist_2_joint']}</param>
+        </state_interface>
+        <state_interface name="velocity" />
+        <state_interface name="effort" />
+      </joint>
+      <joint name="${prefix}wrist_3_joint">
+        <command_interface name="position">
+          <param name="min">{-2*pi}</param>
+          <param name="max">{2*pi}</param>
+        </command_interface>
+        <command_interface name="velocity">
+          <param name="min">-3.2</param>
+          <param name="max">3.2</param>
+        </command_interface>
+        <state_interface name="position">
+          <!-- initial position for the FakeSystem and simulation -->
+          <param name="initial_value">${initial_positions['wrist_3_joint']}</param>
+        </state_interface>
+        <state_interface name="velocity" />
+        <state_interface name="effort" />
+      </joint>
+
+    </ros2_control>
+  </xacro:macro>
+</robot>

+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://www.ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+  <xacro:macro name="velodyne_puck"
+               params="parent_link
+                       xyz:='0.0 0.0 0.0'
+                       rpy:='0.0 0.0 0.0'
+                       namespace:=''
+                       device_namespace:=''">
+
+    <xacro:property name="ns" value="${namespace + '/' if namespace != '' else ''}" />
+    <xacro:property name="prefix" value="${device_namespace + '_' if device_namespace != '' else ''}" />
+    <xacro:property name="device_ns" value="${device_namespace + '/' if device_namespace != '' else ''}" />
+
+    <joint name="${parent_link.rstrip('_link')}_to_${prefix}velodyne_puck_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="${xyz}" rpy="${rpy}" />
+      <parent link="${parent_link}" />
+      <child link="${prefix}velodyne_puck_link" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${prefix}velodyne_puck_link">
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 0.0" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://husarion_components_description/meshes/velodyne_puck.dae" />
+        </geometry>
+      </visual>
+
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 ${0.072/2.0}" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <cylinder radius="${0.103/2.0}" length="0.072" />
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 ${0.072/2.0}" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+        <mass value="0.830" />
+        <inertia ixx="0.001111" ixy="0.0"      ixz="0.0"
+                                iyy="0.001109" iyz="0.0"
+                                               izz="0.001493" />
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${prefix}velodyne_puck_to_${prefix}velodyne_joint"
+      type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 0.0378" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+      <parent link="${prefix}velodyne_puck_link" />
+      <child link="${prefix}velodyne" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${prefix}velodyne" />
+
+    <gazebo reference="${prefix}velodyne">
+      <!-- gpu_lidar has to be set, CPU lidar doesn't work in ignition -
+      https://github.com/gazebosim/gz-sensors/issues/26 -->
+      <sensor type="gpu_lidar" name="${ns}${prefix}velodyne_puck_sensor">
+        <visualize>false</visualize>
+        <update_rate>10.0</update_rate>
+
+        <ray>
+          <scan>
+            <horizontal>
+              <samples>900</samples>
+              <resolution>1</resolution>
+              <min_angle>-${pi}</min_angle>
+              <max_angle>${pi}</max_angle>
+            </horizontal>
+            <vertical>
+              <samples>16</samples>
+              <resolution>1</resolution>
+              <min_angle>-${15.0/180.0*pi}</min_angle>
+              <max_angle>${15.0/180.0*pi}</max_angle>
+            </vertical>
+          </scan>
+          <range>
+            <min>0.4</min>
+            <max>100.0</max>
+            <resolution>0.003</resolution>
+          </range>
+          <noise>
+            <type>gaussian</type>
+            <mean>0.0</mean>
+            <stddev>0.0008</stddev>
+          </noise>
+        </ray>
+
+        <topic>${ns}${device_ns}velodyne_points</topic>
+        <gz_frame_id>${ns}${prefix}velodyne</gz_frame_id>
+        <always_on>true</always_on>
+      </sensor>
+    </gazebo>
+  </xacro:macro>
+</robot>

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+
+<!--
+Copyright 2025 Husarion. All Rights Reserved.
+
+Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
+you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
+You may obtain a copy of the License at
+
+  http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
+
+Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
+distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
+WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
+See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
+limitations under the License.
+-->
+
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://www.ros.org/wiki/xacro" name="wibotic_station">
+
+  <xacro:arg name="device_namespace" default="" />
+  <xacro:arg name="apriltag_image_path" default="" />
+  <xacro:arg name="apriltag_size" default="0.07" />
+
+  <xacro:macro name="wibotic_station"
+               params="parent_link
+                       xyz:='0.0 0.0 0.0'
+                       rpy:='0.0 0.0 0.0'">
+
+    <xacro:property name="prefix" value="${device_namespace + '_' if device_namespace != '' else ''}" />
+
+    <joint name="${parent_link.rstrip('_link')}_to_${prefix}wibotic_station_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="${xyz}" rpy="${rpy}" />
+      <parent link="${parent_link}" />
+      <child link="${prefix}wibotic_station_link" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${prefix}wibotic_station_link">
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0.0 0.0 0.0" rpy="0.0 0.0 ${pi/2.0}" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://husarion_components_description/meshes/wibotic_station.stl" />
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="LightGrey">
+          <color rgba="0.6 0.6 0.6 1.0" />
+        </material>
+      </visual>
+
+      <!-- Fake collision fit to STL -->
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="-0.2 0.0  0.4" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <box size="0.4 0.5 0.8" />
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+
+      <!-- Fake inertia -->
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="-0.2 0.0 0.0" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" />
+        <mass value="15.0" />
+        <inertia ixx="0.001111" ixy="0.0" ixz="0.0"
+          iyy="0.001111" iyz="0.0"
+          izz="0.001111" />
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${prefix}wibotic_station_to_${prefix}wibotic_transmitter_joint" type="fixed">
+      <!-- This should be when docking is released for panther-docker
+      <origin xyz="0.05 0.0 0.295" rpy="0.0 0.0 ${pi}" /> -->
+      <origin xyz="0.05 0.0 0.5" rpy="0.0 0.0 ${pi}" />
+      <parent link="${prefix}wibotic_station_link" />
+      <child link="${prefix}wibotic_transmitter_link" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${prefix}wibotic_transmitter_link" />
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+  <xacro:macro name="create_apriltag"
+    params="name size:=$(arg apriltag_size) device_namespace:=''">
+
+    <xacro:property name="prefix" value="${device_namespace + '_' if device_namespace != '' else ''}" />
+
+
+    <link name="${prefix}${name}_link">
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <box size="${size+0.02} ${size+0.02} 0.00005" />
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="White">
+          <color rgba="1.0 1.0 1.0 1.0" />
+        </material>
+      </visual>
+      </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_to_${name}_${prefix}image_link_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 -${pi/2.0} ${pi/2.0}" />
+      <parent link="${prefix}${name}_link" />
+      <child link="${prefix}${name}_image_link" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${prefix}${name}_image_link">
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 ${pi/2.0} 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <box size="${size+0.02} ${size+0.02} 0.0001" />
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 ${pi/2.0} 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <box size="${size} ${size} 0.0001" />
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="Grey">
+          <color rgba="0.15 0.15 0.15 1.0" />
+        </material>
+      </visual>
+
+      <inertial>
+        <mass value="1e-5" />
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <inertia ixx="1e-6" ixy="0" ixz="0" iyy="1e-6" iyz="0" izz="1e-6" />
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+
+    <gazebo reference="${prefix}${name}_image_link">
+      <visual>
+        <material>
+          <diffuse>1.0 1.0 1.0 1</diffuse>
+          <specular>0.6 0.6 0.6 1</specular>
+          <ambient>1.0 1.0 1.0</ambient>
+          <lighting>true</lighting>
+          <emissive>0 0 0 1</emissive>
+          <pbr>
+            <metal>
+              <albedo_map>$(arg apriltag_image_path)</albedo_map>
+            </metal>
+          </pbr>
+        </material>
+      </visual>
+    </gazebo>
+
+    <xacro:property name="apriltag_size_prop" value="$(arg apriltag_size)" />
+    <xacro:wibotic_station
+      device_namespace="$(arg device_namespace)" parent_link="${prefix}${name}_image_link"  xyz="0.0 0.0 0.5"
+      rpy="${pi} 0 0 " />
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+  <xacro:create_apriltag name="apriltag" device_namespace="$(arg device_namespace)" size="$(arg apriltag_size)" />
+
+</robot>

data.author: husarafal
data.message:
Big clean up +  frame standarization (#9)

* readme: add disclaimer that manipulators are only supported in sim

* readme: add DEVs to sensor table

* code style: align sensor table rows

* fix teltonika URDF crash

* rename unused "name" param in kinova to avoid confusion with component names

* urdf: rename namespace arg to robot_namespace

* remove all existing occurences of "component_name"; component_name -> component_model_name

* components.urdf: remove default component names

* device_namespace -> component_name

* readme: update xacro params list

* component-specific urdfs: remove default component names

* main urdf: ns -> robot_namespace_value

* macros: rename prefixes:
ns -> robot_namespace_slash
prefix -> component_name_underscore
device_ns -> component_name_slash

* macros: replace the uses of ${robot_namespace}/ and ${component_name}_ or with / at the end

* kinova: add robot_namespace_slash gz_frame_id prefix

* macros: add default component names

* REVIEWME: standarize frame names

* device_namespace_prefix -> component_name_gz_prefix

* remove ros2_control bug workaround
https://github.com/ros-controls/ros2_control/issues/1506

* replace leftover device_namespace -> component_name

* main urdf: remove robot_namespace_value

* kinova urdf: remove robot_name

* urdfs: set default d435 and astra names to "camera"

* Remove extra robotiq_ in name

* urdf default name teltonika -> gps

* revert ouster/velodyne/rplidar/zed reading frame changes

* standarize astra and zed gz sensor names

* fix unit tests

* remove unused imports

* rename teltonika frame

+> [!NOTE] +> The manipulators (code `MAN`) must only be used within the simulation environment. +> Support for manipulators on a physical robot is implemented as separate software components. +> Please refer to [the official documentation](https://husarion.com/manuals/panther/manipulators). + ## Including sensor First build the package by running: @@ -68,12 +83,11 @@ To include the sensor, use the following code: A list of parameters can be found here: +- `component_name` [*string*, default: **''**] local namespace allowing to distinguish two identical devices from each other. Called `name` in `components.yaml`. - `parent_link` [*string*, default: **None**] parent link to which sensor should be attached. - `xyz` [*float list*, default: **0.0 0.0 0.0**] 3 float values defining translation between base of a sensor and parent link. Values in **m**. - `rpy` [*float list*, default: **0.0 0.0 0.0**] 3 float values define rotation between parent link and base of a sensor. Values in **rad**. -- `namespace` [*string*, default: **''**] global namespace common to the entire robot. -- `device_namespace` [*string*, default: **''**] local namespace allowing to distinguish two identical devices from each other. - -- `model` [*string*, default: **''**] model argument that appears when you want to load the appropriate model from a given manufacturer. +- `robot_namespace` [*string*, default: **''**] global namespace common to the entire robot. Not present in `components.yaml`. +- `model` [*string*, default: **''**] model argument that appears when you want to load the appropriate model from a given manufacturer. Not present in `components.yaml`. Some sensors can define their specific parameters. Refer to their definition for more info.

+Forthcoming

+* Zed add CAM05 and update ZED urdf (`#5 <https://github.com/husarion/husarion_components_description/issues/5>`_)
+* fix rplidar visual (`#4 <https://github.com/husarion/husarion_components_description/issues/4>`_)
+* Add visuals (`#2 <https://github.com/husarion/husarion_components_description/issues/2>`_)
+* Move code from ros_components_description (`#1 <https://github.com/husarion/husarion_components_description/issues/1>`_)
+* Initial commit
+* Contributors: Dawid Kmak, Dominik Nowak, Rafal Gorecki
